texto: Tizzy squawked, and he bounced like a ball on the floor. “I completely forgot; Santa said something more.He said that a book gives your very thoughts wings,That carry you off to see wonderful things,That lift you aloft, throughout time, throughout spaceTo every era and every place!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Dorothea Jensen: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Tizzy squawked, and he bounced like a ball on the floor. “I completely forgot; Santa said somethi…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, christmas, elf pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de natal e elf.
